summary: Iteration 23 Testing COMPLETED: Theme Engine and HomePage.js rewrite verification. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Fixed a bug where Map section wasn't rendering due to sectionMap key mismatch ('locations' vs 'map'). All homepage sections now render correctly with Classic theme styling.

bug_fixed.issue: Map section not rendering because sectionMap used 'locations' key but section_order from database uses 'map' key
bug_fixed.fix: Added both 'map' and 'locations' keys to sectionMap pointing to MapSection component

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 verified the massive HomePage.js rewrite with theme-specific layouts. Key findings: (1) All homepage sections render correctly with Classic theme: About (bordered card), Services (bordered cards), News (internal blog), Blog (external API), Reading List, Map/Locations (Leaflet with markers), Portfolio, Gallery, Testimonials, Contact. (2) Fixed bug: Map section wasn't rendering because sectionMap key was 'locations' but section_order uses 'map' - added both keys to sectionMap. (3) Navbar hero-less detection works - pages without hero get solid background navbar (no white-on-white text). (4) Admin Settings > Themes tab shows 3 theme cards with visual previews. (5) Theme switching via API works (tested modern, classic, default). (6) External blog API proxy at /api/blog/latest fetches from configured blog_api_url. (7) Contact form submission works. (8) All 22 backend API tests passed.

homepage_sections.about: Classic: bordered card with cream background, serif fonts
homepage_sections.services: Classic: bordered cards with teal accent underlines
homepage_sections.map: Leaflet map with marker clustering (FIXED - was not rendering)

navbar_hero_detection.description: ModernNavbar detects if page has hero section via MutationObserver
navbar_hero_detection.hero_pages: Transparent navbar that becomes solid on scroll
